content:
```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle : CssPipeline created
    Idle --> Parsing : process(entry)

    Parsing --> ImportResolution : AST ready
    Parsing --> Error : parse failure

    ImportResolution --> DirectiveDetection : imports inlined
    ImportResolution --> Error : circular import detected

    DirectiveDetection --> ContentScanning : @tailwind found
    DirectiveDetection --> ApplyProcessing : no @tailwind directives

    ContentScanning --> Emitting : glob scan complete
    ContentScanning --> Error : glob pattern error

    Emitting --> ApplyProcessing : layers generated

    ApplyProcessing --> LayerRouting : @apply expanded

    LayerRouting --> Transforming : @layer custom rules routed

    Transforming --> Minifying : transform complete, production build
    Transforming --> Done : transform complete, dev build

    Minifying --> Done : minify complete

    Done --> Idle : watch mode (await next change)
    Done --> [*] : one-shot build
    Error --> [*]
```
